title: To Marcian Augustus.

source.title: NPNF-212. Leo the Great, Gregory the Great

verses.text: (Congratulating him upon the restoration of peace to the Church, and the suppression of the riotous monks; giving his consent also, as a liege subject of the Emperor’s, to the acts of Chalcedon, and asking him to make this known to the Synod.)
